texts: Applied to new episodes. Use the player's speed control to override per session.
Applied to in-app transport buttons and the lock-screen / Control Center skip controls.
Double-tap and triple-tap on AirPods trigger these actions.

texts: When on, an episode is automatically marked played the first time playback reaches its end.
